title: EPS holds Salem MLAs huddle: 'Vijay will eventually come to us'
summary: Edappadi K. Palaniswami chaired a closed-door meeting of AIADMK MLAs from Salem and surrounding districts on May 8, telling them the party should be ready as TVK is likely to approach AIADMK eventually.

title: Salem Steel Plant order book full through Q2, says SAIL
summary: SAIL has confirmed that the Salem Steel Plant's order book is full through the second quarter, driven by sustained demand from auto and stainless segments in southern India.

title: Salem becomes hotbed of post-poll political signalling
summary: With AIADMK headquartered in Salem and TVK growing strong here, the city has emerged as the key node for back-channel political signalling between the parties this week.

title: Salem-Bengaluru highway toll plazas to switch to ANPR-FASTag matching
summary: Toll plazas on the Salem-Bengaluru highway will switch to mandatory ANPR-FASTag matching from May 9 in line with the latest NHAI directive.

title: Salem women's groups rally to defend ₹1,000 monthly scheme
summary: Women's federations in Salem held district-wide rallies demanding that the Magalir Urimai Thogai be retained, expanded and made portable across districts.
